description:
🕒 09:30–12:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-hannouv-onedaymarch/

We'll guide you along an approximately 10 km course (based on last year's Hanno New Green Two-Day March) while you enjoy and learn about Hanno's abundant natural attractions. In the pleasant fresh-green season, visit Hanno Riverbed, Tenranzan, Azumakyo Gorge, and Asahi Mountain.

【Participation fee】
Adults: 1,000 yen
Students: 500 yen

【Capacity】
50 people

【Guide】
Saitama Hanno University staff

【What to bring】
Drinking water, rain gear depending on weather

【Notes】
For more information, see the Saitama Hanno University website: https://hanno-univ.net/
location: 集合 NPO法人埼玉ハンノウ大学事務局 （飯能市仲町6-1(旧飯能織物協同組合事務所棟) 西武池袋線飯能駅下車徒歩7分
summary: Casual New Green One-Day March — Experience Hanno Forest Culture City
